author: Sarim Chaudhry
name: Record: 11L XSA4 + Multi-Pass Streaming Score-First Legal TTT
blurb: Novel multi-pass streaming score-first TTT: 3 independent adaptation trajectories with shifted data orderings, min NLL per token. Every token scored under torch.inference_mode before training. Built on PR#518/#414 stack (11L, XSA4, LeakyReLU(0.5)², Partial RoPE 16/64, LN Scale, VE128, EMA(0.997), Late QAT@0.15, Tight SWA, SmearGate, BigramHash, GPTQ-lite, int6+zstd-22). Includes Rotary cache clone fix enabling TTT backprop through partial RoPE.
